hero_desc: Whappi automates onboarding, moderation, and reminders in your WhatsApp groups. Built for African admins managing active communities.
hero_trust_3_text: Mobile Money payment coming at launch.
vp_title: Stop spending your days policing your groups
vp_benefit_1_desc: Whappi detects unauthorized links, removes unwanted messages, and warns members according to each group's rules.
vp_benefit_2_desc: Every newcomer receives a clear message with the rules, useful links, and the tone set by the admin.
vp_benefit_3_desc: Banned words, warnings, auto-kicks, and action logs — the admin stays in control without monitoring the group all day.
vp_benefit_4_desc: A single dashboard lets you control settings, scheduled messages, and recent activity across several WhatsApp communities.
vp_subtitle: Whappi handles the repetitive work. You stay the admin — with more time and less chaos.
mf_title: What Whappi does for your groups
mf_feature_1_desc: Greet every new member with a personalized message, group rules, and important links.
mf_feature_1_detail_4: Quick templates for school, business, tontine, or client follow-up.
mf_feature_2_desc: Block suspicious links, wild ads, and messages that disrupt your community.
mf_feature_2_detail_4: Clear group notification after each action.
mf_feature_3_desc: Set your thresholds: Whappi warns, counts violations, and auto-kicks when needed.
mf_feature_3_detail_4: Action history to verify every decision.
mf_feature_4_desc: Plan reminders, announcements, and recurring messages to keep members informed without manual repetition.
mf_feature_4_detail_1: Dues, class, worship, or meeting reminders.
pricing_section_desc: Payable in FCFA, tailored for WhatsApp group admins, with a 7-day trial to see the difference before paying.
pricing_plan_1_desc: To test and manage a single active group.
pricing_plan_2_desc: For serious admins managing multiple active groups.
pricing_plan_3_desc: For associations, media, training, or large networks.
faq_subtitle: Setup, security, dedicated number, payment — the points to clarify before trusting a group to Whappi.
faq_subtitle_2: Can't find your answer? Request a WhatsApp demo.
faq_q_1: Can my WhatsApp number get banned?
faq_a_1: Whappi works like a WhatsApp Web session via QR code. Like any unofficial tool, there is no zero risk. We recommend a dedicated bot number, reasonable behavior, and strict anti-spam configuration to reduce risk.
faq_q_2: Do I have to use my personal number?
faq_a_2: No. For a serious group, it's best to use a secondary number dedicated to Whappi. Keep your personal number untouched, and the group clearly sees the bot as a co-admin.
faq_q_3: Do I need technical skills to use Whappi?
faq_a_3: No. You scan a QR code, add the Whappi number to your group, then promote it to admin. Then you choose your rules from the dashboard.
faq_a_4: Yes. The Pro plan is designed for admins managing several communities. You can track rules, logs, reminders, and activity from a single dashboard.
faq_q_5: Does Whappi read all group messages?
faq_a_5: Whappi only analyzes messages needed for moderation: links, banned words, configured rules, and actions to log. The product must remain transparent: the admin knows what is monitored and why.
faq_q_6: How do I pay from Francophone Africa?
faq_a_6: Prices are in FCFA. Mobile Money payment is the priority, with the option to start via direct deposit during the initial rollout.
faq_cta_text: A demo is worth a thousand promises
footer_desc: The WhatsApp co-admin that keeps your groups clean, useful, and easy to manage.
cta_title: Your group can be calmer this week
cta_desc: Test Whappi on a real group for 7 days. See spam removed, new members welcomed, and reminders sent — without chasing every message.
cta_note: Starter plan at 3,500 FCFA/month. Mobile Money payment coming at launch.
testimonials_desc: Cleaner groups, enforced rules, and less time wasted deleting messages.
marquee_text: Built for WhatsApp, Mobile Money, and active groups
